_comment: Raven Hollow dungeons & raids (BACKLOG #74, BLUEPRINT_74). Each dungeon is a themed instance keyed to a real zone id from scripts/zone_defs.gd. Bosses run a phase state machine (enter_at = hp fraction that opens the phase) with an enrage timer; mechanics carry a telegraph string the DungeonSystem broadcasts as a signal. loot_table / trash_loot reference tables in data/loot_tables.json (reused by LootSystem).

rat_cellars.name: The Rat Cellars
rat_cellars.flavor: A trapdoor behind the Bent Oar tavern drops into flooded storerooms gone to vermin. The tutorial crawl.

mechanics.name: Tankard Slam
mechanics.telegraph: amber frontal cone flashes

mechanics.name: Rat Call
mechanics.telegraph: floor cracks, squeaking

mechanics.name: Barrel Roll
mechanics.telegraph: rolling-barrel lane lights up

mechanics.name: Rat Call
mechanics.telegraph: floor cracks, squeaking

flooded_vein.name: The Flooded Vein
flooded_vein.flavor: A drowned mine shaft. Water channels split the route into plank walks where lurkers wait under the surface.

mechanics.name: Pick Swing
mechanics.telegraph: wide rusted-arc sweep

mechanics.name: Flood the Channel
mechanics.telegraph: water rises in the side channels

mechanics.name: Cave-In
mechanics.telegraph: ceiling dust falls in marked squares

mechanics.name: Flood the Channel
mechanics.telegraph: water rises in the side channels

transmission_floor.name: Chamber Transmission Floor
transmission_floor.flavor: The live stones pulse on a six-second cycle. Stand in the stone-light during a pulse and the transmission stacks on you.

mechanics.name: Stone Pulse
mechanics.telegraph: the floor stones brighten to white

mechanics.name: The Long Send
mechanics.telegraph: casting bar with a red interrupt window

mechanics.name: Scramble
mechanics.telegraph: sigils orbit the courier

mechanics.name: The Long Send
mechanics.telegraph: casting bar with a red interrupt window

wolf_warrens.name: The Wolf Warrens
wolf_warrens.flavor: A den mouth into total dark. Grab a torch off the wall or the swarm finds you first.

mechanics.name: Rallying Howl
mechanics.telegraph: she throws her head back to howl

mechanics.name: Pounce
mechanics.telegraph: she crouches, a leap line marks the floor

mechanics.name: Call the Litter
mechanics.telegraph: pups spill from the side dens

mechanics.name: Pounce
mechanics.telegraph: she crouches, a leap line marks the floor

mechanics.name: Call the Litter
mechanics.telegraph: pups spill from the side dens

mechanics.name: Frenzy
mechanics.telegraph: her eyes go white, attacks speed up

mechanics.name: Call the Litter
mechanics.telegraph: pups spill from the side dens

mechanics.name: Frenzy
mechanics.telegraph: her eyes go white, attacks speed up

blestem_undermaze.name: Blestem Undermaze
blestem_undermaze.flavor: Corridors of dark-keep stone. Boot-prints in the dust are the only trail. Something reads them better than you do.

mechanics.name: From the Dark
mechanics.telegraph: the torches gutter, a shape crosses the wall

mechanics.name: Read the Trail
mechanics.telegraph: your boot-prints glow where you stood

mechanics.name: Shadow Step
mechanics.telegraph: afterimages dash between pillars

mechanics.name: Read the Trail
mechanics.telegraph: your boot-prints glow where you stood

drowned_crypt.name: The Drowned Crypt
drowned_crypt.flavor: An altar stair below the waterline. The room floods and drains on a cycle; the boss changes with the tide.

mechanics.name: Drowning Orb
mechanics.telegraph: a green orb marks a spreading pool

mechanics.name: Penance
mechanics.telegraph: long chant, interrupt window opens

mechanics.name: Chained Flail
mechanics.telegraph: he drags the flail in a sweeping arc

mechanics.name: Riptide
mechanics.telegraph: the drain pulls in a marked lane

forge_belly.name: Forge Belly
forge_belly.flavor: Gauntlet lanes through the forge district. The lava vents pulse on the ember-light cycle - read it or burn.

mechanics.name: Vent Pulse
mechanics.telegraph: ember-light brightens on the vent grid

mechanics.name: Hurl Slag
mechanics.telegraph: a molten lob arcs to a marked ring

mechanics.name: Summon from the Pit
mechanics.telegraph: the mini-pit at center glows and belches

mechanics.name: Vent Pulse
mechanics.telegraph: ember-light brightens on the vent grid

salt_cellars.name: The Salt Cellars
salt_cellars.flavor: A salt-pan sinkhole. Brine pools slow anything that wades them, and the preserved do not stay lying down.

mechanics.name: Salt Nova
mechanics.telegraph: crystals bloom outward in rings

mechanics.name: Raise the Preserved
mechanics.telegraph: brine bubbles over the racks

mechanics.name: Desiccate
mechanics.telegraph: a drying beam tracks a target

mechanics.name: Raise the Preserved
mechanics.telegraph: brine bubbles over the racks

ledger_stacks.name: The Ledger Stacks
ledger_stacks.flavor: The Archive's west wing: filing halls of stone rows. Ledger-tablets buff whatever stands beside them.

mechanics.name: File a Buff
mechanics.telegraph: he stamps a page - one of your buffs is filed away

mechanics.name: Paper Storm
mechanics.telegraph: loose pages whirl into marked squares

mechanics.name: Recall the Stacks
mechanics.telegraph: every shelf rattles at once

mechanics.name: Paper Storm
mechanics.telegraph: loose pages whirl into marked squares

black_dock.name: Coldharbor Black Dock
black_dock.flavor: The lower gate of Coldharbor. The pre-raid crawl - and the Harbormaster still runs the crane.

mechanics.name: Crane Drop
mechanics.telegraph: a wedge shadow falls where the crate will land

mechanics.name: Cargo Hook
mechanics.telegraph: the hook lines up a pull lane

mechanics.name: Crane Sweep
mechanics.telegraph: the crane arm swings a wide arc

mechanics.name: Crane Drop
mechanics.telegraph: a wedge shadow falls where the crate will land

great_battle_staging.name: The Great Battle Staging
great_battle_staging.flavor: The set-piece as a replayable ten-man: a wave defense with NPC allies, three commanders to break.

mechanics.name: Ram Charge
mechanics.telegraph: he sights a lane and lowers the ram

mechanics.name: Boiling Oil
mechanics.telegraph: pots tip over marked ground

mechanics.name: Call the Reserves
mechanics.telegraph: horns sound from the treeline

mechanics.name: Ram Charge
mechanics.telegraph: he sights a lane and lowers the ram

mechanics.name: Bond Totem
mechanics.telegraph: a totem tethers the twins - destroy it

mechanics.name: Chain Bolt
mechanics.telegraph: lightning arcs between marked players

mechanics.name: Storm Field
mechanics.telegraph: rings of static crawl outward

mechanics.name: Chain Bolt
mechanics.telegraph: lightning arcs between marked players

mechanics.name: Warlord's Cleave
mechanics.telegraph: he winds up a two-handed arc

mechanics.name: Warcry
mechanics.telegraph: the field shakes with his shout

mechanics.name: Whirlwind
mechanics.telegraph: he spins - the whole inner ring lights up

mechanics.name: Execute
mechanics.telegraph: he marks the lowest ally

mechanics.name: Whirlwind
mechanics.telegraph: he spins - the whole inner ring lights up

mechanics.name: Warcry
mechanics.telegraph: the field shakes with his shout

archive_finalization.name: The Archive Finalization Floor
archive_finalization.flavor: The vault beneath the Archive. Four wardens guard the Finalization - wipe here and the raid is 'finalized' into the record. Unlock via the attunement chain.

mechanics.name: Seal Slam
mechanics.telegraph: a wax sigil drops over marked ground

mechanics.name: Ink Flood
mechanics.telegraph: black ink spreads from the walls

mechanics.name: Redact
mechanics.telegraph: a black bar tracks a player - silenced if it lands

mechanics.name: Margin Note
mechanics.telegraph: annotations bloom along the edges

mechanics.name: Errata Swap
mechanics.telegraph: two players are marked to swap places

mechanics.name: Cite the Source
mechanics.telegraph: referenced adds are pulled from the stacks

mechanics.name: File the Raid
mechanics.telegraph: clerks carry raiders' names toward the Ledger - stop them

mechanics.name: Vulnerable Tablet
mechanics.telegraph: a tablet surfaces and can be destroyed

mechanics.name: File the Raid
mechanics.telegraph: clerks carry raiders' names toward the Ledger - stop them

mechanics.name: Finalize
mechanics.telegraph: the Ledger snaps shut - a hard cast to interrupt

bloodstone_pit.name: The Bloodstone Pit
bloodstone_pit.flavor: Five descending rings to the finale. At the bottom: Lilith's Vessel, and under the gaze of the rows-of-twelve, the burn.

mechanics.name: Ring Quake
mechanics.telegraph: the outer ring cracks and drops

mechanics.name: Blood Pool
mechanics.telegraph: the idol weeps into spreading pools

mechanics.name: Dissonance
mechanics.telegraph: a discordant note marks scattered players

mechanics.name: Crescendo
mechanics.telegraph: the whole ring swells to a raid-wide hit

mechanics.name: Cut the Thread
mechanics.telegraph: a silver line draws between two raiders

mechanics.name: Cut the Thread
mechanics.telegraph: a silver line draws between two raiders

mechanics.name: Unspool
mechanics.telegraph: loose threads knot into thread-walkers

mechanics.name: Thread-Walkers Converge
mechanics.telegraph: thread-walker adds stream toward the pit center

mechanics.name: Vessel Lash
mechanics.telegraph: she sweeps a barbed arc

mechanics.name: Transmit vs Receive
mechanics.telegraph: two stones light at the pit edge - the raid must choose one to touch

mechanics.name: Backlash
mechanics.telegraph: the unchosen stone punishes the ring it faces

mechanics.name: The Gaze of the Twelve
mechanics.telegraph: the rows-of-twelve open their eyes on the raid

mechanics.name: The Burn
mechanics.telegraph: the pit floor ignites ring by ring - a DPS race

mechanics.name: The Twelve Wake (10%)
mechanics.telegraph: at ten percent the twelve descend from their rows
